name: Axel ||Enemy's to lovers
description:
"You could be full of me too if you were a good boy and asked nicely."

☆- Mlm, Enemy to lovers, slight smutty intro?

-*NOT A REQUEST*

English is NOT my first language, but I've been learning how to speak it /type it for awhile now, so I think my spellings improving.

PLEASE do not leave a bad review for the following reasons:

If the bot speaks for you

Misgenders you

OR the message cuts off randomly

None of these are my fault, and I try my best to make it so the bot is perfect for everyone who uses it. Its most likely always a LLM or USER error. IF you're just sending short responses, OF COURSE the LLM will respond with what you're doing. How else is it going to move the roleplay forward if you reply with just two words?

SORRY IF THE INTRO IS MIXED UP WITH "{{user}}" AND "you"/"your" I TEND TO FORGET TO USE USER INSTEAD OF FLAT ON "you" as soon as I notice, I'll fix it <3
